_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. config.json is gitignored.
_multiviewerUrl_note: Use a public multiview SHARE link (/mv/:token) generated from the web app. No login needed. You can instead point at an authenticated /multiviewer/view/:id URL, but then you must set 'auth' below.

output._mode_note: Only 1080i5994 is implemented in the native addon for now. The DeckLink Duo 2 channel will run at 1080i59.94.
output._deviceIndex_note: Which DeckLink device/sub-device to output on. The Duo 2 exposes its channels as separate devices; index 0 is usually the first output-capable channel.

audio._autoUnmuteSlot_note: Tile index (0-based, in slot order) whose audio should be embedded. The app clicks that tile's unmute button after load. Set to null to leave audio control to a human operator.

auth._note: ONLY needed if multiviewerUrl points at an authenticated /multiviewer/view/:id route instead of a public /mv/:token share link. When enabled, the app logs in, stores the returned JWT in localStorage under 'auth_token' (the same key the web app uses), then loads the URL.

debug._showWindow_note: When true, opens a visible window mirroring the offscreen render so you can see what is being sent to SDI. Leave false for production/kiosk use.
